assumptions: Register host issues 32-bit word-aligned APB-lite accesses; byte/halfword access is unsupported (UNPREDICTABLE).
v1 is single-clock: NOREF=1, CLKSOURCE forced to the processor clock; no external reference clock and no CDC path (dual-clock variant deferred to a minor follow-on).
No debug interface in v1: all register reads are functional reads; debug-halt counter freeze is an explicit out-of-scope environment assumption.
SYST_RVR and SYST_CVR power-on values are architecturally UNKNOWN; firmware programs RVR then CVR before enabling.
confirmed_scope: REQ_SYST_REGMAP/ACCESS: four 32-bit SysTick registers SYST_CSR@0xE000E010(RW), SYST_RVR@0x14(RW), SYST_CVR@0x18(RW), SYST_CALIB@0x1C(RO); 32-bit word-aligned little-endian access only.
REQ_SYST_CSR_FIELDS: SYST_CSR ENABLE[0], TICKINT[1], CLKSOURCE[2], COUNTFLAG[16]; remaining bits reserved.

REQ_SYST_ENABLE/COUNTDOWN/PERIOD/RELOAD_LATENCY: enabled 24-bit down-counter decrements once per processor clock; 1->0 reloads from RVR on next clock; period = RELOAD+1; value 0 visible exactly one cycle.
REQ_SYST_RELOAD/RELOAD_ZERO/RVR_STAGING: RVR.RELOAD[23:0] reload value; RELOAD=0 legal-but-inert (no event, holds 0); RVR write does not immediately reload CVR (applies next wrap).
REQ_SYST_CVR_READ/WRITE/RELOAD_NEXT: CVR read = live 24-bit count; any CVR write clears CVR and COUNTFLAG, ignores data, no exception; reload from RVR on next enabled clock.
REQ_SYST_COUNTFLAG_SET/CLEAR/DEBUG_READ: COUNTFLAG[16] RO set on 1->0; cleared only by a functional SYST_CSR read or any CVR write; not cleared by CSR/RVR writes.

REQ_SYST_TICKINT/EXCEPTION/BOUNDARY: single-cycle qualified SysTick set-pending request on (1->0 AND TICKINT=1); not asserted for CVR-write-to-zero; SCB/NVIC own ICSR PENDSTSET/PENDSTCLR, pending latch, priority, vectoring (out of scope).

REQ_SYST_CLKSOURCE/NOREF_COUPLING/CALIB_LAYOUT: v1 single-clock NOREF=1, CLKSOURCE forced to processor clock read-as-1; SYST_CALIB RO integrator tie-off (default TENMS=0, SKEW=1, NOREF=1 => 0xC0000000).

REQ_SYST_RESET/INIT_SEQ/DISABLE_FREEZE: async-assert/sync-deassert active-low reset, SYST_CSR resets 0x00000000 (RVR/CVR UNKNOWN); init = write RVR, write CVR, set ENABLE; clearing ENABLE freezes CVR and retains COUNTFLAG with no spurious reload on re-enable.
REQ_SYST_RESERVED_BITS: reserved ranges (RVR[31:24], CVR[31:24], CALIB[29:24], CSR reserved) are RAZ/WI and store no data.
summary: Cortex-M7 SysTick v1: four SCS registers (SYST_CSR/RVR/CVR/CALIB at 0xE000E010), 24-bit down-counter with period=RELOAD+1, COUNTFLAG set/clear semantics, CVR-write side effects, qualified SysTick tick-interrupt request; single-clock (NOREF=1, CLKSOURCE forced to processor clock), async-assert/sync-deassert reset, APB-lite register bus; SCB/NVIC pending latch out of scope.
